caption: A group of men perform a synchronized martial arts routine on a large blue stage within a grand ballroom. The setting features high ceilings with recessed lighting and large crystal chandeliers hanging overhead, while a seated audience watches from the background. Several performers wear white traditional uniforms, one wears a dark navy or black uniform, and a lead performer in the center wears a vibrant blue outfit. As the sequence progresses, the men move in unison, transitioning from wide stances with arms raised into more focused, grounded poses. The lead performer in blue moves from an upright position with one arm raised to a more stable stance with arms lowered. The performers' coordinated movements shift across the stage, with their postures becoming more centered and controlled as the routine continues. No on-screen text or logos are visible.
